title: Item Page - Close one level at a time
excerpt:

posts.author: KRosenfeldt (Kasper Rosenfeldt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

Using the item page to quickly access lots of information on boards with many columns is definitely recommended, and gives a lot of great functionality overall. There is an issue, however, when going several levels deep through connect board columns.

If you open another item page through a connect board column on the previous one, closing the item page closes all item pages and sends you straight back to the board. This is frustrating when you have to edit information on a connected item and want to go back to the original item page.

Instead, the item page should only close one “level”, sending you back to the previous item in the chain. If you want to go to the board, you can always click outside of the item page to go directly to the board.
